title: Fresh AI Tweaks
description: Allows Fresh Animations to work with Mob AI Tweaks
body:
**Requires:**

**-Fresh Animation v1.9 or higher, v1.9.2 is the most recommended for versions 1.21.1 and below while 1.10.1 for versions 1.21.5 and above!**

-[Mob AI Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-ai-tweaks) mod

-Entity Model Features or Optifine

A pack that allows Mob AI Tweaks to work with Fresh Animations

Features:

-Eating animation for Pillagers.

-Reworked bow pulling animation for skeletons.

-Improved special attack animations for Wither Skeletons and Evokers.

-Improved swimming and throwing animations for Drowned.

-Attack animations for Allays.

-And much more!

Sample images:

![Stray vs Iron Golem to demonstrate reworked bow animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cb50ccc9bd46081f59b76729b02ecdead84a8d0_0.webp)

![Pillager eating a baked potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a3e376eaa3c1ba9e3a48d4b3ea0e8a714b3a364_0.webp)

Load order:

![Load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f604fc1a7a5616e03b9e41de550d5cae92a24827.png)

**Notice:** not all FA extension packs are supported, some of them changes the animations even further which leads to them overrididing this pack's custom animation fixes. Sadly, can't do much as it is a limitation with EMF/Optifine's animator engine. The best solution is to make my own fixes to those resource packs but it might be painful to maintain.

**Known Issues:** Armor rendering is incorrect on baby skeletons for 1.21.5-10 versions. This is an EMF issue!
